pr_text:
## Title: Fix missing null terminator in UCI stats dump buffer

### Summary
The `dump_uci_stats()` function in the PUCCH module builds a formatted statistics report using `sprintf()` into a fixed-size character buffer, but fails to null-terminate the string before passing it to printing functions. This causes out-of-bounds memory reads when `fprintf()` or `printf()` attempts to determine the string length, leading to potential segmentation faults, buffer overreads, or garbage output in logs.
